default.title: Your session expires in 10 minutes
default.description: Save your work to avoid losing any unsaved changes.

variants.title: New feature available
variants.description: Explore the updated dashboard for a faster workflow.

variants.title: Changes saved
variants.description: Your profile has been updated successfully.

variants.title: Storage limit approaching
variants.description: You have used 90% of your available storage.

variants.title: Payment failed
variants.description: We could not process your card. Please update your billing details.

appearances.label: Filled background with inverse text — maximum prominence
Muted tinted background with status border — balanced
Transparent background with full status border — lightweight
Tinted background with bold inline-start bar — contextual

sizes.label: Standard — default padding and icon size
Compact — reduced padding for dense layouts

dismissible.title: Dismissible
dismissible.description: A dismiss button appears on the trailing edge.

longTitle.title: This is a very long alert title that may span multiple lines depending on the available container width and the typography scale in use

longDescription.title: Extended description
longDescription.description: This description contains a lot of text to verify that the alert banner handles multi-line body content correctly without truncating or clipping any important information that the user needs to see.
